06

She doesn't take your word for it.

What you say is a hypothesis. She watches what you do.

What you say vs. what you do
I'm disciplined with money.
The data says otherwise — three impulse buys this week, all after midnight. Let's fix the system, not the story: I've drafted a 24-hour rule for anything over $50.
07

A memory for the relationships you keep meaning to keep.
